title: Camera+
description: Camera+ is a Minecraft plugin that enables realistic camera functions, screenshots, perspective changes, and creative filmmaking for players and servers.
body:
Camera+ – CCTV Cameras for Your Server

With Camera+, you can place surveillance cameras on your Minecraft server and view them at any time. Perfect for cities, prisons, role-playing servers, or simply for monitoring your base.

🔹 Features

Place working CCTV cameras

Monitor areas from your camera's perspective

Simple commands

Ideal for security systems or RP servers

🔹 Commands

/cctv give
→ Gives you a Camera item, which you can use to place a surveillance camera.

/cctv <CameraName>
→ Opens the camera with the specified name and shows you its perspective.
